# Boldpiq

> Boldpiq is a South African web design and development agency building high-performance Next.js websites, brand identities, and e-commerce solutions for businesses across South Africa and internationally.

## Services

- [Home](https://www.boldpiq.com/): Overview of Boldpiq's web design, development, branding, and digital marketing services with portfolio highlights and process overview.
- [Services & Packages](https://www.boldpiq.com/services): Detailed breakdown of service packages — web design, Next.js development, brand identity, Shopify e-commerce, and digital marketing with pricing tiers.
- [Book a Discovery Call](https://www.boldpiq.com/contact): Free 30-minute discovery call to discuss website requirements, timeline, and budget with the Boldpiq team.
- [Book a 45-Min Strategy Session](https://www.boldpiq.com/contact45min): Extended 45-minute session for in-depth project scoping, existing-site audits, and digital strategy planning.
- [About Boldpiq](https://www.boldpiq.com/about): Agency background, team, design philosophy, and approach to building high-converting web experiences.

## Process

- [What to Expect](https://www.boldpiq.com/what-to-expect): Step-by-step overview of how BoldPiq delivers projects — Discovery Call, Design & Build, Review & Refine, and Launch & Handover. Typical timeline 3 weeks.

## Portfolio

- [Work & Case Studies](https://www.boldpiq.com/work): Portfolio of completed client projects across hospitality, professional services, retail, and non-profit sectors.
- [Whitesons Case Study](https://www.boldpiq.com/work/case-whitesons): Website redesign and branding project for Whitesons.
- [Bright Haven Case Study](https://www.boldpiq.com/work/case-bright-haven): Full website build and digital presence for Bright Haven.
- [Netvirpret Case Study](https://www.boldpiq.com/work/case-netvirpret): Website and digital presence build for Netvirpret.
- [The Cherri Chilli Case Study](https://www.boldpiq.com/work/case-the-cherri-chilli): E-commerce and brand identity for The Cherri Chilli.

## Legal & Compliance

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.boldpiq.com/privacy): POPIA and GDPR-compliant privacy policy covering data collection, storage, and user rights.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.boldpiq.com/terms): Service terms governing project agreements, intellectual property, and payment conditions.
- [Data Processing Agreement](https://www.boldpiq.com/dpa): GDPR-compliant DPA for clients whose projects involve personal data processing.
- [PAIA Manual](https://www.boldpiq.com/paia): South African PAIA compliance manual as required by law.
- [Refund Policy](https://www.boldpiq.com/refund): Refund and cancellation terms for project retainers and service packages.

## Key Facts

- Location: South Africa (Cape Town-based, remote-first, serving clients nationally and internationally)
- Specialisation: Next.js web development, UI/UX design, brand identity, Shopify e-commerce
- Technology stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Sanity CMS
- Markets served: South Africa (Cape Town, Johannesburg, Pretoria), Sub-Saharan Africa, international clients
- CRM platform: GoHighLevel (GHL) for client automation — email, SMS, booking, and pipeline management
- Differentiator: GEO-optimised websites (AI search ready) built for Core Web Vitals and conversion performance
- Compliance: POPIA, GDPR, PAIA compliant
- Industry: Web design and development agency
